dialogue_text: Because that isn't the way we Lions do these things,
source_excerpt: "Because that isn't the way we Lions do these things," he replied. Then giving a great spring, he shot through the air and landed safely on the other side. They were all greatly pleased to see how easily he did it, and after the Scarecro...
